name.value: North Hill Golf Club Chiang Mai

designer.note: Described as designed by a local Thai designer. Name not found in research.

year_opened.note: Originally 9-hole Mezza 9 Golf Club in 2011. Expanded to 18 holes and renamed North Hill Golf Club in November 2015.

green_fee_weekday_thb.note: Package rate per golfer including caddie and cart. No weekday/weekend distinction.

phone.note: Phone not confirmed in search results. Check northhillchiangmai.com.

address.value: 333 Moo 13, Ban Waen, Hang Dong, Chiang Mai 50230, Thailand

latitude.note: Approximate — Ban Waen, Hang Dong. Needs map verification.

drive_time_from_bangkok_min.note: Chiang Mai is ~700km from Bangkok — visitors fly (1h10m BKK→CNX), drive not practical. Course is 15 min from CNX airport.

prose.overview: North Hill Golf Club Chiang Mai is the most recently developed 18-hole course in the Chiang Mai area, having expanded from 9 holes to a full 18-hole layout in November 2015. Located in Ban Waen, Hang Dong district — approximately 15 minutes south of Chiang Mai International Airport — it is one of the most conveniently positioned courses for travellers arriving at CNX without needing to transit through the city. The course operates as part of the North Hill City Resort complex, which also encompasses a spa, fitness centre, bar and restaurant facilities. At 6,789 yards and par 72, it is a mid-length layout suited to a range of handicaps and has attracted a loyal following among Chiang Mai-based golfers seeking a well-maintained course with comprehensive resort facilities. The setting is valley rather than mountain, with views of the surrounding hills providing the Northern Thai scenic backdrop that visitors expect.
prose.layout_and_experience:
The course was originally conceived as a 9-hole private club (Mezza 9) and the expansion to 18 holes created a layout that integrates parkland-style fairways with water hazards and bunkering throughout. The 6,789-yard total is comfortable for most standards of player from the back tees, with shorter tee options available for higher-handicap golfers. The fairways are relatively generous, but accuracy on the approach remains important — the greens are protected by well-positioned bunkers and water hazards on several key par-4s.

The Hang Dong location places the course on flat-to-gentle terrain compared to the hillier Mae Rim courses to the north, making walking less strenuous (though carts remain compulsory). The course maintains the same daily green fee rate with no weekday/weekend distinction, and the all-in package includes caddie and cart. Caddie service is compulsory, one caddie per player.

Facilities at North Hill stand out for the quality and range of on-site amenities: the MIX Bar & Restaurant, spa, and deluxe driving range are among the best integrated at any Chiang Mai golf venue, making it a full-day destination rather than a drive-and-play round.
prose.tips: At approximately 15 minutes from CNX airport, North Hill is an ideal first or last round on a Chiang Mai golf trip — it does not require navigating city traffic. The all-in green fee package (approximately 3,400 THB including caddie and cart) simplifies budgeting. The deluxe driving range is a good warm-up option before the round. Book through the official website (northhillchiangmai.com) or a golf booking platform for the most current rates. The course plays well year-round due to its flat valley setting — morning rounds are comfortable even in the hot season (March–May) with cooler temperatures in the early hours.
prose.location_and_access: North Hill Golf Club is located in Ban Waen, Hang Dong district, approximately 15 minutes south of Chiang Mai International Airport (CNX). Visitors from Bangkok fly to CNX (approximately 1 hour 10 minutes from Suvarnabhumi or Don Mueang) — driving the 700 kilometres from Bangkok is not practical for a golf trip. This is one of the closest Chiang Mai courses to the airport, making it very convenient for arrival or departure rounds. A Grab taxi from CNX takes approximately 15 minutes.
prose.rental_cta_context: Stopping off at North Hill Golf Club on your Chiang Mai golf trip? Rent premium clubs in Bangkok — delivered to your hotel before you fly — so you can jump straight from the airport to the first tee without the hassle of checked baggage.
